film

Pinocchio: Unstrung

FantasyHorrorThriller

Influenced by a sinister Cricket and created by Geppetto, Pinocchio launches a violent crusade to carve himself into a real boy like his brother James, one piece at a time.

▶ Előzetes

film

Ip Man: Kung Fu Legend

Akció

In 1950s Hong Kong, British merchants and Chinese triads have joined forces to expand their territory, forcibly demolishing factories without regard for public welfare. This move draws fierce opposition from Ip Man, standing up for the workers, he faces pressure from all sides. Framed for murder, he is sent to prison. Within the prison walls, the triads set multiple deadly traps. Can Ip Man overcome these trials, escape the danger, and clear his name?

▶ Előzetes
📅 2026-07-22
film

Elize: Shadows of a Woman

Krimi

In this retelling of a real case, a former escort discovers her wealthy husband's infidelity and struggles to cope as betrayal poisons their marriage.

film

The Dink

VígjátékSport

Dusty „a Pöröly” Boydra, a levitézlett profi teniszezőre ráférne egy győzelem. Azért, hogy megmentse a küszködő sportklubot és kivívja apja tiszteletét, Dusty megszegi a szent esküt, és megteszi az elképzelhetetlent: pickleballt játszik.

Dokumentum

film

The Truthers

DrámaThriller

Ruth, a 30-year-old woman who has been estranged from her family for some time, returns home when her mother dies under strange circumstances. There, she is reunited with her father, Martín, who since retiring seems to have become a grumpy, aggressive man obsessed with a sinister conspiracy theory. The relationship between the two of them is so tense, and his behavior so erratic, that Ruth begins to suspect Martín might be responsible for her mother's death. Is it possible she's sharing a roof with a murderer?

▶ Előzetes
📅 2026-07-24
film

Sudesha

Dokumentum

The story of a woman living in a village in the lower Himalayas. In this area, people depend entirely on the forest for their daily needs of firewood, food and water. But the forests have been destroyed by powerful timber traders. And along with the forest, the livelihood of the people has been greatly altered. The women of this region played an active role in the "Chipkow Movement". Sudesha was imprisoned for her protest.

▶ Előzetes
📅 2026-07-25
film

Wham! 10 Days in China

DokumentumZene

In 1985, Wham! were the first Western pop group to perform in communist China. George Michael and Andrew Ridgeley’s two concerts in Beijing and Guangzhou introduced live Western pop to Chinese audiences and marked a turning point for the band. For Wham!, the tour was more than music; it was a bold move to capture American attention and launch them into global superstardom, and it worked.

▶ Előzetes
📅 2026-07-28

premierek · 2026-07-20 .. 2026-08-04 (következő 15 nap)
film

Jana Nayagan

AkcióDrámaThriller

A clash of ideologies. One stands for the people, the other feeds on control. Their paths collided once before. Years later, a child’s silent fear ignites the past, drawing a former police officer into a battle far bigger than personal revenge.

film

Pókember: Vadonatúj nap

AkcióFantasySci-Fi

A Végítélet napja után Peter Parker megpróbál a főiskolára koncentrálni, és maga mögött hagyni Pókembert. De amikor egy új fenyegetés veszélyezteti barátait, meg kell szegnie ígéretét, és újra be kell öltöznie, hogy egy váratlan szövetségessel összefogva megvédje szeretteit.

film

Soulm8te

HorrorThrillerSci-Fi

After a ruthless tech giant acquires his company, a grieving engineer is tasked with testing their new AI companion. But when he attempts to program her to be a truly sentient soulmate, she develops needs of her own—unleashing a relentless spree of precision-engineered mayhem.

Fruit Gathering

Dráma

In industrial Yangon, young factory worker San Kyi dreams of returning to her native village. Her relationship with co-worker Theint Theint Oo evolves from closeness to growing distance, revealing tensions between their expectations and life prospects. Amid exhausting labour, social repression, and economic uncertainty, both women seek escape and intimacy.

film

I, Object

AnimációDrámaFantasy

Grieving the loss of his father and unable to relate to the people in his life, 10-year-old Tom takes refuge in the everyday objects around him; they reveal their true identities and speak to Tom, helping him in his healing process.
